NAVAREA XIX 2/19

ONE SCIENTIFIC ROCKET WILL BE LAUNCHED FROM ANDOEYA SPACE CENTER ON ANDOEYA IN THE PERIOD FROMJANUARY 10TH TO JANUARY 17TH 2019. THE LAUNCH WILL BE CONDUCTED BETWEEN 0700-1200 UTC, IN THE
ANNOUNCED PERIOD.
MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING HAZARD AREAS

AREA 1 G-CHASER 1ST STAGE
A. 6928.50N-01552.04E
B. 6928.93N-01559.10E
C. 6925.45N-01601.39E
D. 6918.07N-01603.82E
E. 6917.64N-01558.27E
F. 6925.06N-01553.14E
G  6928.50N-01552.04E

AREA 2 G-CHASER 2ND STAGE
A. 7054.04N-01416.79E
B. 7022.61N-01437.03E
C. 7028.22N-01618.53E
D. 7059.36N-01607.85E
E. 7054.04N-01416.79E

SEE WWW.ANDOYASPACE.NO FOR DAILY UPDATES AND MAPS.
NORWEGIAN NOTICE TO MARINERS 24/18 REFFERS
